title: Arcane Hand
description: Adds a unique multi-tool with a unique enchantment system.
body:
**NOTICE: Arcane Hand is no longer being maintained in favor of the [Arcanity mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcanity).** ![arcane hand. a unique multi-tool with infinite potential](https://i.imgur.com/GIvlsdS.png) Arcane Hand is a mod that adds a new item, the **Gauntlet**. The **Gauntlet** is a multi-tool that serves as a weapon, pickaxe, axe, shovel, and hoe, all in one. Unlike most tools in Minecraft, the **Gauntlet** cannot be enchanted inside an Enchanting Table. Instead, you must use the new **Arcane Console**.

![select any enchantments. enable or disable enchantments at any time](https://i.imgur.com/bUR950C.png) The **Arcane Console** allows you to select any enchantment you desire, allowing you to enable and disable enchantments as needed. After selecting an enchantment, you must level it up with experience. There are four new enchantments added specifically for the Gauntlet: - **Abundance**: Similar to Fortune and Looting. Causes mobs and blocks to have a chance to drop more loot. (Max Levels: 3) - **Blaze**: Sets mobs on fire and also smelts the drops of blocks. (Max Levels: 1) - **Collect**: When mining, items will be collected directly into your inventory. (Max Levels: 1) - **Excavate**: When mining, you will mine in a 3x3 area. (Max Levels: 1) - **Vein Mining**: When mining, matching connected blocks will also be broken. (Max Levels: 1)

![earn experience and level up your enchantments](https://i.imgur.com/zuZb8va.png) To use a selected enchantment, you must level it up with experience. Hold the gauntlet and pick up experience orbs to level up your enchantments. If you have several enchantments selected, one will be chosen at random to progress. While hovering over a Gauntlet, you can scroll to view the experience progression for your enchantments.

![personalize your gauntlet! dyeable like other leather items](https://i.imgur.com/bFi4Fas.png) Gauntlets can be dyed by combining them with dye(s). Using a dyed gauntlet on a cauldron containing water removes any dye from it.

## Permissions ✅ You may use this mod in modpacks. ✅ You may create add-ons, extensions, or companion mods. ✅ You may submit pull requests to contribute to the code. ❌ You may not publish this mod or modified versions anywhere without explicit permission.
